text.title: Project Closure with Lessons Extraction Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree mapping closure-report state to a rule.

decision-tree.root-question: Is outcome-vs-charter variance documented with reason?

branch.when: variance_missing == false AND lesson_generic == false AND owner_missing == true
variance_missing == false AND lesson_generic == false AND owner_missing == false AND date_invalid == true
variance_missing == false AND lesson_generic == false AND owner_missing == false AND date_invalid == false AND next_review_missing == true

conclusion.verdict: schedule lesson-adoption review at next kick-off

branch.when: variance_missing == false AND lesson_generic == false AND owner_missing == false AND date_invalid == false AND next_review_missing == false

conclusion.verdict: preconditions not met; route to correct methodology or skip.

text.example: variance_missing=false, lesson_generic=false, owner_missing=false, date_invalid=false, next_review_missing=false → accept closure report.
